name: Freedos with Xcom
summary: Freedos with Xcom on v86 — disk = a content-addressed κ-DAG.

description.p: Freedos with Xcom boots on the v86 x86-to-wasm JIT. Its disk is not a blob — it is an ordered set of content-addressed κ-blocks, streamed lazily and re-derived per block before the guest sees a byte (Law L5).
